name: feature.campaign-connectors.nodes
description: Campaign Connectors node pack (ADR 0159 / ADR 0014) — `import-csv` (parse a platform CSV export onto the unified metric schema with dedup + computed fields) and `sync` (pull a platform's performance through the Connections broker; honest-off with `connector_not_configured` until the broker reach is wired — ADR 0037 day-1 matrix). Over ctx.features['campaign-connectors'].
author: OpenWOP App

nodes.label: Connectors: Import CSV
nodes.description: Imports a platform CSV export into the campaign performance store (dedup by platform|campaign|adSet|date, computed metrics). Inputs: { orgId, csv, defaultPlatform?, campaignId? }. Output: { imported, deduped, invalid, issues }.

nodes.label: Connectors: Sync (live)
nodes.description: Pulls a platform's performance through the Connections broker. Honest-off: returns `connector_not_configured` until the broker reach is wired (ADR 0037). Inputs: { orgId, platform }. Output: { synced } or a structured not-configured failure.
